name: being-reasonix
description: BEing Reasonix — DeepSeek-native AI coding agent desktop launcher
author: BEing Reasonix

scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.pack:win: npm run bundle:deps && npm run build && electron-builder --win
scripts.pack:mac: npm run bundle:deps && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.pack:all: npm run bundle:deps:all && npm run build && electron-builder --win --mac
